raw_consumer_statement: I had multiple accounts compromised. I first noticed fraudulent charges on my credit card on XX/XX/year>. I then found that my XXXX  email account, XXXX account, XXXX account, and other accounts had also been compromised. I have been taking steps to dispute, close, or otherwise freeze those accounts. The perpetrator of the fraud is continuing to attempt to login to these accounts and open credit cards using my information.
